analysis: The project appears to be a static website with a focus on black holes, featuring animated slides and pages. The current files include HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for the main content, as well as a GitHub Pages version and a test website. The theme is likely dark and cosmic, given the black hole topic. The existing to-dos indicate incomplete CSS and JavaScript files, particularly for animations and mobile responsiveness. The goal is to enhance the UI with a black hole theme, including animated objects and slides.

improvements.description: Enhance the CSS with a dark, cosmic theme, including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements to create an immersive experience.
Complete the JavaScript to ensure all functions are properly implemented, particularly for handling animated slides and interactive elements related to black holes.
Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices, ensuring the site is responsive and user-friendly.
